title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Sir Amik Varze

startPoint.en: Inspect Sir Amik Varze in the banquet hall in Lumbridge Castle.
startPoint.es: Inspecciona a Sir Amik Varze en el salón de banquetes del Lumbridge Castle.

quests.title: Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest

items.name: Empty pot
items.display: Empty pot (can be obtained during quest, bought from chest or picked from the table in the kitchen)

items.name: Radimus notes
items.display: Radimus notes if you haven't completed Legends' Quest

items.name: Dramen staff
items.display: Dramen staff or Lunar staff if you haven't completed A Fairy Tale III - Battle at Ork's Rift

items.name: Raw chicken
items.display: Raw chicken (can be obtained during the quest at the Chicken Shrine)

items.name: Dramen branch
items.display: Dramen branch (or cinnamon, made from a Dramen branch)

kills: Evil Chicken (levels vary around 70, depending on player's level)

rewards.name: Evil Chicken's Lair
rewards.display: Access to the Evil Chicken's Lair, where you can fight black dragons

rewards.name: Culinaromancer's chest
rewards.display: Further access to the Culinaromancer's chest

text.en: Inspect Sir Amik Varze.
text.es: Inspecciona a Sir Amik Varze.

text.en: Talk to the Cook in the Lumbridge Castle kitchen.
text.es: Habla con el Cook en la cocina del Lumbridge Castle.

text.en: Use a bucket of milk with a pot of cream.
text.es: Usa un bucket of milk con un pot of cream.

text.en: Locate a windmill (Taverley windmill doesn't work) and pick up an empty pot on the .
text.es: Localiza un molino de viento (el Taverley windmill no funciona) y coge un pot vacío en el mismo.

text.en: Put sweetcorn into the hopper on the .
text.es: Pon sweetcorn en la tolva del molino.

text.en: Operate the hopper controls, then take from the flour bin on the .
text.es: Acciona los controles de la tolva y luego coge harina del cajón de harina del molino.

text.en: Use the milky mixture with the pot of cornflour.
text.es: Usa la mezcla lechosa con el pot of cornflour.

text.en: Go to the Kharazi Jungle with a machete and hatchet (tool belt works for both) or use CJS if unlocked.
text.es: Ve a la Kharazi Jungle con un machete y un hatchet (el tool belt sirve para ambos) o usa uno si lo tienes desbloqueado.

text.en: Have Radimus notes with you, if Legends' Quest isn't completed.
text.es: Lleva contigo las Radimus notes si no has completado la Legends' Quest.

text.en: Head southwest of the pool to the beach to find five vanilla plants.
text.es: Dirígete al suroeste de la laguna, hacia la playa, para encontrar cinco vanilla plants.

text.en: Search a Vanilla plant and add the vanilla pod to the cornflour mixture for brulee.
text.es: Registra una vanilla plant y añade la vanilla pod a la mezcla de cornflour para hacer la brulee.

steps.section: Evil Chicken's Egg and Dragon Token

text.en: Go to Draynor Village and talk to the Wise Old Man.
text.es: Ve a Draynor Village y habla con el Wise Old Man. include 3 and 4 -->

chatOptions: 3/4 I'd just like to ask you something. <!-- Possible options (under unknown conditions) include 3 and 4 -->

steps.section: Evil Chicken's Egg and Dragon Token

text.en: Head to Zanaris. Use a raw chicken on the Chicken shrine. (Kill a chicken near the shrine for a raw chicken if you need one).
text.es: Dirígete a Zanaris. Usa un raw chicken en el Chicken shrine. (Mata un pollo cerca del santuario para conseguir un raw chicken si lo necesitas).

steps.section: Evil Chicken's Egg and Dragon Token

text.en: Head north and kill the Evil Chicken.
text.es: Ve hacia el norte y mata al Evil Chicken.

steps.section: Evil Chicken's Egg and Dragon Token

text.en: If the chicken is not in the shrine, talk to the Cook and attempt to fight it again.
text.es: Si el pollo no está en el santuario, habla con el Cook e intenta luchar contra él de nuevo.

steps.section: Evil Chicken's Egg and Dragon Token

text.en: Take the evil chicken's egg (right-click the loot pile, as area loot won't show it).
text.es: Coge el egg del evil chicken (haz clic derecho en el montón de botín, ya que el botín de área no lo mostrará).

steps.section: Evil Chicken's Egg and Dragon Token

text.en: Head south and kill a black dragon.
text.es: Dirígete al sur y mata a un black dragon.

steps.section: Evil Chicken's Egg and Dragon Token

text.en: Take the dragon token it drops (right-click the loot pile, as area loot won't show it).
text.es: Coge el dragon token que suelta (haz clic derecho en el montón de botín, ya que el botín de área no lo mostrará).

steps.section: Evil Chicken's Egg and Dragon Token

text.en: Use the egg on the brulee.
text.es: Usa el egg en la brulee.

text.en: Craft your dramen branches branch, selecting pestle and mortar.
text.es: Elabora tu dramen branch, seleccionando el pestle and mortar.

text.en: If you do not have Dramen branches, cut one from the dramen tree in the Entrana Dungeon.
text.es: Si no tienes dramen branches, corta uno del dramen tree en la Entrana Dungeon.

text.en: Add the cinnamon to the brulee.
text.es: Añade la cinnamon a la brulee.

text.en: Wear the ice gloves or dragonfire protection, otherwise you can take up to 500 damage if you don't have them on for the next few steps.
text.es: Ponte los ice gloves o la dragonfire protection, de lo contrario podrías recibir hasta 500 de daño si no los llevas puestos durante los próximos pasos.

text.en: Rub the dragon token in either Lumbridge or Zanaris.
text.es: Frota el dragon token en Lumbridge o en Zanaris.

text.en: Ask the Fairy Dragon to flambé the brulee.
text.es: Pídele al Fairy Dragon que flambée la brulee.

chatOptions: 1 Please flambe this creme brulee for me.

text.en: Head back to Lumbridge Castle then use brulee supreme on Sir Amik.
text.es: Regresa al Lumbridge Castle y luego usa la brulee supreme en Sir Amik.

text.en: Subquest complete!
text.es: ¡Submisión completada!
